calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Janet Brayer, Esq. for Plaintiff: Juned Shaikh, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Johnny Wang as follows:
Principal $6,400.00
Check return fees $18.00
Attorney's Fees $2,600.00
Costs $192.60, for a total of $9,210.60
Judgment signed in open court.

Ntc Of Prove Up Hrg, Re: Default
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Continued To Jul-22-05 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
